The memo: -
Salary and non-salary of teachers / non-teaching staff in Special Non-Government Schools / Workshops for Persons with Disabilities
Regarding the prescribed procedure to be followed before payment of arrears, Reference No. 1 dated 13th September, 2022
The directions have been issued by the Government Circular No. 2 as prescribed under the letter dated 27th September, 2023 hereunder.
Instructions have been issued to scrutinize and submit proposals as per the scrutiny list done.
Central Government has revised the pay scale for Government employees with effect from 01.01.2016 (Seventh Pay Scale).
Commission) has decided to implement. Accordingly, full-time in government schools with state government employees.

The implementation of the pay structure for teaching and non-teaching staff has been notified under the Government Notification dated 30th January, 2019 of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Revised Pay) Rules, 2019. Also dated 20 of the Department of Finance
Details regarding fixation of initial pay and payment of arrears as per Government Circular dated February, 2019

The procedure has been prescribed. Accordingly, as per the Government Decision dated 23rd April, 2021 of the erstwhile Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance, through an NGO in the State under the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities.
Residential / Non-Residential Special Schools / Workshops for Non-Govt Aided and Aided Persons with Disabilities to be run
Full-time teaching and non-teaching staff of MATIMAND CHILD HOUSES with effect from 1st January, 2016.
The revised pay structure of the Commission has been approved.

Also, the additional expenditure arising out of the revised pay structure implemented under this order is to be incurred on the salaries and allowances of teachers and non-teaching staff under the same head of account for which the expenditure is incurred.
The directions have been issued under the said Government Decision.

No Pay) principle will apply. Accordingly, the disbursement of funds has been approved. In addition, other matters

9. No expenditure may be made for any purpose other than the purpose for which the fund / grant is sanctioned. As well as other
Funds cannot be diverted to the head of the account.
